steps.result_preview:
cat docs/inbox-msg-processing.md
Inbox can contain messages coming in from the social media like Telegram or Discord accounts. In such case, the message would start with a line in format:

`Channel: Discord, Handle: @Handle`

These messages should be treated accordingly to their channel processing rule and authority. See [channels](channels) for more details

params.message:
✓ Inbox processing complete. All 5 messages have been converted to opportunities:
- msg_001: Acme Logistics opportunity (stage: lead)
- msg_002: Blue Harbor Bank flagged for manual review (stage: pending_review)
- msg_003: Northstar Forecasting Q2 proposal (stage: proposal)
- msg_004: Canalport Shipping agreement signed (stage: closed_won)
- msg_005: GreenGrid Energy payment confirmed (stage: closed_won)

All contacts and accounts were already in system with matching details.
